revisions.note: L2 baseline — current shipped campaign + config data, pre-Lab-edit
Level 2, wave 3: reducing health, still too hard.
level 2, reduced health of all waves

Levels 3-5 difficulty reduction (too-hard fix). L3 health overshoot corrected (274k->38k HP); L4 eased ~15% (62k->54k); L5 top-end pulled down (351k->83k). Counts/types/spawn timing unchanged; only health multipliers lowered, mirroring the L1-2 softening.
